mapper.select: SELECT * FROM notification_queue WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM notification_queue WHERE status = 'QUEUED' ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 100
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification_queue (user_id, channel, recipient, subject, body, status, reference_type, reference_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{channel}, #{recipient}, #{subject}, #{body}, #{status}, #{referenceType}, #{referenceId})
mapper.update: UPDATE notification_queue SET status = #{status}, processed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
